# PriceGap

> PriceGap is an independent buyer-education site that explains real cost gaps in recurring digital products: hosting, domains, VPNs, password managers, and software subscriptions.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://pricegap.co/): overview of PriceGap's recurring-cost guides.
- [About](https://pricegap.co/about.html): editorial positioning and site purpose.
- [Affiliate Disclosure](https://pricegap.co/affiliate-disclosure.html): affiliate and editorial disclosure.
- [Advertiser Information](https://pricegap.co/advertiser-info.html): information for affiliate networks and advertisers.

## Category guides

- [Hosting & VPS](https://pricegap.co/hosting/): hosting renewal, VPS, add-on, and 3-year cost guides.
- [Domain](https://pricegap.co/domain/): domain renewal, privacy, transfer, DNS, and registrar-lock-in guides.
- [VPN](https://pricegap.co/vpn/): VPN renewal, monthly vs multi-year, and free-vs-paid privacy guides.
- [Password Managers](https://pricegap.co/password-managers/): individual vs family, browser-vs-paid, and renewal-cost guides.

## Featured buyer checklists

- [Domain Renewal Price Checklist](https://pricegap.co/domain/domain-renewal-price-checklist.html): what to check before registering a domain name.
- [Cheap Web Hosting Renewal Fees Checklist](https://pricegap.co/hosting/cheap-web-hosting-renewal-fees-checklist.html): hosting intro price vs renewal cost checklist.
- [VPN Renewal Price Checklist](https://pricegap.co/vpn/vpn-renewal-price-checklist.html): VPN auto-renew, refund, and plan-length checklist.
- [Password Manager Renewal Checklist](https://pricegap.co/password-managers/password-manager-renewal-family-plan-checklist.html): individual vs family renewal-cost checklist.

## Editorial notes

PriceGap does not publish live price guarantees. Readers should verify current provider prices, renewal terms, refund policies, and advertiser availability before purchase.
